violations.text: Establishment did not have food safety manager at time of inspection. Please email inspector proof of enrollment and completion of a food safety manager course. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2025

The door to the outside, located in the production room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the fan and shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety certified with RIDOH. Application printed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/26/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. All items were placed in dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 07/26/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the portable fan and wall fan have an accumulation of dust and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/09/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 08/09/2024
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. Application printed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the back and downstairs prep area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Hand soap placed at hand sinks. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. In addition the temperature gauge of the machine only reached 139.1 degrees. Establishment to switch to 3-bay sink until dish machine is serviced/repaired. Dish washer to be tested to ensure it reaches proper temperature. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024

Working containers of dry ingredients (sprinkles, etc.) are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024

Baked goods packaged in the food establishment are lacking adequate labels. The name of the FOOD source for each MAJOR FOOD ALLERGEN contained in the FOOD unless the FOOD source is already part of the common or usual name of the respective ingredient New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2024

The hose at the 3-bay sink is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2024
The basement has an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024
